# CDAO Awards Anduril Production Agreement to Deliver Edge Data Mesh

The U.S. Department of Defense’s Chief Digital and AI Office (CDAO) has awarded Anduril Industries a three-year production agreement to scale a first of its kind tactical Edge Data Mesh, powered by Anduril’s Lattice Mesh.
